scope: Meta-wrapper that runs another wrapper against a historical ref. Fixture stands up tmp git repo with HEAD~1 containing only early_func and HEAD adding late_func. Asserts: every output record is tagged ref:HEAD~1; late_func absent (added in HEAD); early_func present. Imperative driver because we need a controlled git history.
stdout_must_contain: PASS: late_func correctly absent at HEAD~1
